'''Parla Tentase''' was a [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] passenger aboard the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] when it was [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|attacked]] by the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]]. Tentase was a "veteran vacationer," and had a vague feeling of strangeness about the voyage.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] calls Tentase a "[[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]]" rather than a "Kiffar."

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
